Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*****************************************************************************************

 Other laws for enriched profunctors

 In this file we establish some miscellaneous related about enriched profunctors.

 Contents
 1. The interchange law
 2. Cylinder laws for the left unitor
 3. Cylinder laws for the right unitor
 4. Cylinder laws for the associator
 5. Composition and whiskering
 6. Saturation of the Verity double bicategory of enriched profunctors

 *****************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.BenabouCosmos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Profunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.StandardProfunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Invertible.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorSquares.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Coend.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.CompositionProf.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.SquareComp.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.Associators.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.Whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Opaque sym_mon_braiding.

(** * 1. The interchange law *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₉: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
E₉: enrichment C₉ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₆
R₁: enriched_profunctor E₇ E₈
R₂: enriched_profunctor E₈ E₉
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₄
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₄
F₂: C₄ ⟶ C₇
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₄ E₇
G₁: C₂ ⟶ C₅
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₂ E₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₅ E₈
H₁: C₃ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₃ E₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₉
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₆ E₉
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₁ EH₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH₂ Q₂ R₂
comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₉: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
E₉: enrichment C₉ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₆
R₁: enriched_profunctor E₇ E₈
R₂: enriched_profunctor E₈ E₉
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₄
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₄
F₂: C₄ ⟶ C₇
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₄ E₇
G₁: C₂ ⟶ C₅
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₂ E₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₅ E₈
H₁: C₃ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₃ E₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₉
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₆ E₉
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₁ EH₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH₂ Q₂ R₂
comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₉: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
E₉: enrichment C₉ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₆
R₁: enriched_profunctor E₇ E₈
R₂: enriched_profunctor E₈ E₉
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₄
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₄
F₂: C₄ ⟶ C₇
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₄ E₇
G₁: C₂ ⟶ C₅
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₂ E₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₅ E₈
H₁: C₃ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₃ E₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₉
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₆ E₉
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₁ EH₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ₁ τ₂ z x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ (H₁ z)
    (F₁ x) =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₉: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
E₉: enrichment C₉ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₆
R₁: enriched_profunctor E₇ E₈
R₂: enriched_profunctor E₈ E₉
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₄
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₄
F₂: C₄ ⟶ C₇
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₄ E₇
G₁: C₂ ⟶ C₅
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₂ E₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₅ E₈
H₁: C₃ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₃ E₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₉
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₆ E₉
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₁ EH₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z x y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ₁ τ₂ z x
   · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂
       (H₁ z) (F₁ x)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z x y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ₁ τ₂ z x
   · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂
       (H₁ z) (F₁ x)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH₂ Q₂ R₂

· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ₁ τ₂ z x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ (H₁ z)

x: C₁

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ₁ τ₂ z x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ (H₁ z)
    (F₁ x) = ?b

· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x

    (F₁ x) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₉: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
E₉: enrichment C₉ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₆
R₁: enriched_profunctor E₇ E₈
R₂: enriched_profunctor E₈ E₉
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₄
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₄
F₂: C₄ ⟶ C₇
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₄ E₇
G₁: C₂ ⟶ C₅
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₂ E₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₅ E₈
H₁: C₃ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₃ E₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₉
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₆ E₉
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₁ EH₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ₁ τ₂ z x =
?y'

    apply comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₉: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₆
R₁: enriched_profunctor E₇ E₈
R₂: enriched_profunctor E₈ E₉
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₄

EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₃ E₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₉
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₆ E₉
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₁ EH₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
τ₁ y x #⊗ τ₂ z y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F₁ x)
    (G₁ y)
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ (H₁ z)
    (F₁ x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x

x: C₁
y: C₂
τ₁ y x #⊗ τ₂ z y
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F₁ x)
     (G₁ y)
   · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂
       (H₁ z) (F₁ x)) =

x: C₁

· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ (H₁ z)
    (F₁ x) = ?t2

    apply (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor_comm θ₁ θ₂).

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₆
R₁: enriched_profunctor E₇ E₈
R₂: enriched_profunctor E₈ E₉
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₄
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₄
F₂: C₄ ⟶ C₇
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₄ E₇
G₁: C₂ ⟶ C₅
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₂ E₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₅ E₈
H₁: C₃ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₃ E₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₉
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₆ E₉

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₁ EH₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
τ₁ y x #⊗ τ₂ z y
· (θ₁ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) #⊗ θ₂ (H₁ z) (G₁ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in R₁ R₂ (H₂ (H₁ z))
       (F₂ (F₁ x)) (G₂ (G₁ y))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₉: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

E₅: enrichment C₅ V

E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
E₉: enrichment C₉ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₆
R₁: enriched_profunctor E₇ E₈
R₂: enriched_profunctor E₈ E₉
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₄
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₄
F₂: C₄ ⟶ C₇
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₄ E₇
G₁: C₂ ⟶ C₅
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₂ E₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₅ E₈
H₁: C₃ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₃ E₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₉
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₆ E₉
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₁ EH₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x =
τ₁ y x #⊗ τ₂ z y
· (θ₁ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) #⊗ θ₂ (H₁ z) (G₁ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in R₁ R₂ (H₂ (H₁ z))
       (F₂ (F₁ x)) (G₂ (G₁ y)))

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x =
τ₁ y x #⊗ τ₂ z y
· θ₁ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) #⊗ θ₂ (H₁ z) (G₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in R₁ R₂ (H₂ (H₁ z))
    (F₂ (F₁ x)) (G₂ (G₁ y))

    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
    (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x = 
?b

    apply (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor_comm
             (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
             (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂)).
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₉: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
E₉: enrichment C₉ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₆
R₁: enriched_profunctor E₇ E₈
R₂: enriched_profunctor E₈ E₉
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₄
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₄
F₂: C₄ ⟶ C₇
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₄ E₇
G₁: C₂ ⟶ C₅
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₂ E₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₅ E₈
H₁: C₃ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₃ E₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₉
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₆ E₉
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₁ EH₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁ y x
#⊗ comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂ z y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in R₁ R₂ ((H₁ ∙ H₂) z)
    ((F₁ ∙ F₂) x) ((G₁ ∙ G₂) y) =
τ₁ y x #⊗ τ₂ z y
· θ₁ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) #⊗ θ₂ (H₁ z) (G₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in R₁ R₂ (H₂ (H₁ z))
    (F₂ (F₁ x)) (G₂ (G₁ y))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₉: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
E₉: enrichment C₉ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₆
R₁: enriched_profunctor E₇ E₈
R₂: enriched_profunctor E₈ E₉
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₄
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₄
F₂: C₄ ⟶ C₇
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₄ E₇
G₁: C₂ ⟶ C₅
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₂ E₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₅ E₈
H₁: C₃ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₃ E₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₉
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₆ E₉
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₁ EH₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
(τ₁ y x · θ₁ (G₁ y) (F₁ x))
#⊗ (τ₂ z y · θ₂ (H₁ z) (G₁ y))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in R₁ R₂ (H₂ (H₁ z))
    (F₂ (F₁ x)) (G₂ (G₁ y)) =
τ₁ y x #⊗ τ₂ z y
· θ₁ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) #⊗ θ₂ (H₁ z) (G₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in R₁ R₂ (H₂ (H₁ z))
    (F₂ (F₁ x)) (G₂ (G₁ y))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₉: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
E₉: enrichment C₉ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₆
R₁: enriched_profunctor E₇ E₈
R₂: enriched_profunctor E₈ E₉
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₄
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₄
F₂: C₄ ⟶ C₇
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₄ E₇
G₁: C₂ ⟶ C₅
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₂ E₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₅ E₈
H₁: C₃ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₃ E₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₉
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₆ E₉
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₁ EH₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
(τ₁ y x · θ₁ (G₁ y) (F₁ x))
#⊗ (τ₂ z y · θ₂ (H₁ z) (G₁ y))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in R₁ R₂ (H₂ (H₁ z))
    (F₂ (F₁ x)) (G₂ (G₁ y)) =
(τ₁ y x · θ₁ (G₁ y) (F₁ x))
#⊗ (τ₂ z y · θ₂ (H₁ z) (G₁ y))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in R₁ R₂ (H₂ (H₁ z))
    (F₂ (F₁ x)) (G₂ (G₁ y))

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 2. Cylinder laws for the left unitor *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id G) EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_id_enrichment E₃) EG)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id F) EF
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_id_enrichment E₁) EF)
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₁
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square
     (id_h_enriched_profunctor_square P) τ) =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₂ τ


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id G) EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_id_enrichment E₃) EG)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id F) EF
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_id_enrichment E₁) EF)
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₁
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square
     (id_h_enriched_profunctor_square P) τ) =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₂ τ

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id G) EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_id_enrichment E₃) EG)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id F) EF
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_id_enrichment E₁) EF)
z: C₃
x: C₁
identity (P z x) · τ z x
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (identity (G z))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G z) (G z) (F x) =
τ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (identity (F x))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F x) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id G) EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_id_enrichment E₃) EG)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id F) EF
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_id_enrichment E₁) EF)
z: C₃
x: C₁
τ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (identity (G z))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G z) (G z) (F x) =
τ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (identity (F x))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F x) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id G) EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_id_enrichment E₃) EG)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id F) EF
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_id_enrichment E₁) EF)
z: C₃
x: C₁
τ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (identity (G z))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
      · lmap_e Q (G z) (G z) (F x))) =
τ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (identity (F x))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
      · rmap_e Q (G z) (F x) (F x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id G) EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_id_enrichment E₃) EG)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id F) EF
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_id_enrichment E₁) EF)
z: C₃
x: C₁
τ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
   · (enriched_id E₄ (G z) #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
      · lmap_e Q (G z) (G z) (F x))) =
τ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
   · (enriched_id E₂ (F x) #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
      · rmap_e Q (G z) (F x) (F x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id G) EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_id_enrichment E₃) EG)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id F) EF
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_id_enrichment E₁) EF)
z: C₃
x: C₁
τ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
   · mon_lunitor (Q (G z) (F x))) =
τ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
   · mon_lunitor (Q (G z) (F x)))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (lunitor_enriched_profunctor P) τ =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q)
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square
     (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF) τ)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (lunitor_enriched_profunctor P) τ =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q)
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square
     (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF) τ)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor P z x · τ z x =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
  (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF) τ z x
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ y : C₁,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P z x y
· (lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor P z x · τ z x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P z x y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
     (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF) τ z x
   · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x, y: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P z x y
· (lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor P z x · τ z x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P z x y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
     (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF) τ z x
   · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x, y: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P z x y
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor P z x · τ z x =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF) τ z x
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x, y: C₁
rmap_e P z y x · τ z x =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF) τ z x
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x, y: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF) τ z x
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x) =
rmap_e P z y x · τ z x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x, y: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF) τ z x
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x) = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x, y: C₁
?b = rmap_e P z y x · τ z x

· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄

τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x, y: C₁

  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF) τ z x = ?y'

    apply comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor_comm.

x, y: C₁
id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF y x #⊗ τ z y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q (G z) (F x)
    (F y)
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x) =
rmap_e P z y x · τ z x

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x, y: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q (G z) (F x)
  (F y)
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x) = 
?t2

    apply (lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm Q).
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x, y: C₁
id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF y x #⊗ τ z y
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F y) (F x) = rmap_e P z y x · τ z x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x, y: C₁
EF y x #⊗ τ z y · rmap_e Q (G z) (F y) (F x) =
rmap_e P z y x · τ z x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x, y: C₁
EF y x #⊗ τ z y · rmap_e Q (G z) (F y) (F x) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y, x ⦄) #⊗ τ z y
· rmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q) z y x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x, y: C₁
EF y x #⊗ τ z y · rmap_e Q (G z) (F y) (F x) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y, x ⦄) #⊗ τ z y
· (EF y x #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F y))
   · rmap_e Q (G z) (F y) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x, y: C₁
EF y x #⊗ τ z y · rmap_e Q (G z) (F y) (F x) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y, x ⦄) #⊗ τ z y
· EF y x #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F y))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F y) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x, y: C₁
EF y x #⊗ τ z y · rmap_e Q (G z) (F y) (F x) =
EF y x #⊗ τ z y · rmap_e Q (G z) (F y) (F x)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 3. Cylinder laws for the right unitor *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id G) EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment EG
     (functor_id_enrichment E₄))
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id F) EF
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂))
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₁
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ
     (id_h_enriched_profunctor_square Q)) =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₂ τ


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id G) EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment EG
     (functor_id_enrichment E₄))
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id F) EF
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂))
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₁
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ
     (id_h_enriched_profunctor_square Q)) =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₂ τ

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id G) EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment EG
     (functor_id_enrichment E₄))
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id F) EF
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂))
z: C₃
x: C₁
τ z x · identity (Q (G z) (F x))
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (identity (G z))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G z) (G z) (F x) =
τ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (identity (F x))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F x) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id G) EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment EG
     (functor_id_enrichment E₄))
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id F) EF
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂))
z: C₃
x: C₁
τ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (identity (G z))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G z) (G z) (F x) =
τ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (identity (F x))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F x) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id G) EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment EG
     (functor_id_enrichment E₄))
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id F) EF
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂))
z: C₃
x: C₁
τ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (identity (G z))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
      · lmap_e Q (G z) (G z) (F x))) =
τ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (identity (F x))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
      · rmap_e Q (G z) (F x) (F x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id G) EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment EG
     (functor_id_enrichment E₄))
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id F) EF
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂))
z: C₃
x: C₁
τ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
   · (enriched_id E₄ (G z) #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
      · lmap_e Q (G z) (G z) (F x))) =
τ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
   · (enriched_id E₂ (F x) #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F x))
      · rmap_e Q (G z) (F x) (F x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id G) EG
  (functor_comp_enrichment EG
     (functor_id_enrichment E₄))
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment (nat_trans_id F) EF
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂))
z: C₃
x: C₁
τ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
   · mon_lunitor (Q (G z) (F x))) =
τ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F x))
   · mon_lunitor (Q (G z) (F x)))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) τ =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (runitor_enriched_profunctor Q)
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ
     (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG))


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) τ =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (runitor_enriched_profunctor Q)
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ
     (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor P z x · τ z x =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ
  (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG) z x
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ y : C₃,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₃) z x y
· (runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor P z x · τ z x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₃) z x y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ
     (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG) z x
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₃) z x y
· (runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor P z x · τ z x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₃) z x y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ
     (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG) z x
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x))

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₃) z x y
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor P z x · τ z x =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₃) z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ
    (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG) z x
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· lmap_e P y z x · τ z x =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₃) z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ
    (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG) z x
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x)

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q

x: C₁
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₃) z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ
    (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG) z x
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· lmap_e P y z x · τ z x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄

y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₃) z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ
    (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG) z x
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x) = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· lmap_e P y z x · τ z x

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₃) z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ

· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x) =

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂

EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₃) z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ
    (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG) z x = ?y'

    apply comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
τ y x #⊗ id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG z y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₄) (G z) (F x)
    (G y)
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· lmap_e P y z x · τ z x

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
τ y x #⊗ id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG z y
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₄) (G z) (F x)
     (G y)
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· (lmap_e P y z x · τ z x)

· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₄) (G z) (F x)
     (G y)
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x)) =

x: C₁

?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· (lmap_e P y z x · τ z x)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
τ y x #⊗ id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG z y
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₄) (G z) (F x)
     (G y)
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x)) =
?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₄) (G z) (F x) (G y)
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor Q (G z) (F x) = 
?t2

    apply (runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm Q).
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
τ y x #⊗ id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG z y
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q (G y) (F x))
     (E₄ ⦃ G z, G y ⦄) · lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· (lmap_e P y z x · τ z x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
τ y x #⊗ EG z y
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q (G y) (F x))
     (E₄ ⦃ G z, G y ⦄) · lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· (lmap_e P y z x · τ z x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
τ y x #⊗ EG z y
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q (G y) (F x))
     (E₄ ⦃ G z, G y ⦄) · lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄) #⊗ τ y x
   · lmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q) y z
       x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
τ y x #⊗ EG z y
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q (G y) (F x))
     (E₄ ⦃ G z, G y ⦄) · lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄) #⊗ τ y x
   · (EG z y #⊗ identity (Q (G y) (F x))
      · lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
τ y x #⊗ EG z y
· sym_mon_braiding V (Q (G y) (F x)) (E₄ ⦃ G z, G y ⦄)
· lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄) #⊗ τ y x
· EG z y #⊗ identity (Q (G y) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· EG z y #⊗ τ y x · lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄) #⊗ τ y x
· EG z y #⊗ identity (Q (G y) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· (EG z y #⊗ τ y x · lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄) #⊗ τ y x
   · (EG z y #⊗ identity (Q (G y) (F x))
      · lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
EG z y #⊗ τ y x · lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x) =
identity (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄) #⊗ τ y x
· (EG z y #⊗ identity (Q (G y) (F x))
   · lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
EG z y #⊗ τ y x · lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x) =
identity (E₃ ⦃ z, y ⦄) #⊗ τ y x
· EG z y #⊗ identity (Q (G y) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₃
EG z y #⊗ τ y x · lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x) =
EG z y #⊗ τ y x · lmap_e Q (G y) (G z) (F x)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 4. Cylinder laws for the associator *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₂ E₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₃ E₄
G₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₅ E₆
G₂: C₆ ⟶ C₇
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₆ E₇
G₃: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₅
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₆
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₇
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EG₃ P₃ P₄
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_id ((G₁ ∙ G₂) ∙ G₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁ EG₂) EG₃)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁
     (functor_comp_enrichment EG₂ EG₃))
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_id ((F₁ ∙ F₂) ∙ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₂) EF₃)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁
     (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₃))
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₁
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁
     (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃)) =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₂
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square
     (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃)


V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃

F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₃ E₄
G₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₅ E₆
G₂: C₆ ⟶ C₇
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₆ E₇
G₃: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₅
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₆
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₇
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EG₃ P₃ P₄
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_id ((G₁ ∙ G₂) ∙ G₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁ EG₂) EG₃)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁
     (functor_comp_enrichment EG₂ EG₃))
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_id ((F₁ ∙ F₂) ∙ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₂) EF₃)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁
     (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₃))
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₁
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁
     (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃)) =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₂
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square
     (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₂ E₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₃ E₄
G₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₅ E₆
G₂: C₆ ⟶ C₇
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₆ E₇
G₃: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₅
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₆
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₇
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EG₃ P₃ P₄
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_id ((G₁ ∙ G₂) ∙ G₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁ EG₂) EG₃)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁
     (functor_comp_enrichment EG₂ EG₃))
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_id ((F₁ ∙ F₂) ∙ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₂) EF₃)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁
     (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₃))
z: C₅
x: C₁
τ₁ z x
· (τ₂ (G₁ z) (F₁ x) · τ₃ (G₂ (G₁ z)) (F₂ (F₁ x)))
· mon_linvunitor
    (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
· enriched_from_arr E₈ (identity (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))))
  #⊗ identity (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
· lmap_e P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z)))
    (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))) =
τ₁ z x · τ₂ (G₁ z) (F₁ x) · τ₃ (G₂ (G₁ z)) (F₂ (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (identity (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
  #⊗ identity (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
· rmap_e P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)))
    (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₂ E₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₃ E₄
G₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₅ E₆
G₂: C₆ ⟶ C₇
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₆ E₇
G₃: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₅
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₆
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₇
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EG₃ P₃ P₄
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_id ((G₁ ∙ G₂) ∙ G₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁ EG₂) EG₃)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁
     (functor_comp_enrichment EG₂ EG₃))
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_id ((F₁ ∙ F₂) ∙ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₂) EF₃)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁
     (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₃))
z: C₅
x: C₁
τ₁ z x
· (τ₂ (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
   · (τ₃ (G₂ (G₁ z)) (F₂ (F₁ x))
      · (mon_linvunitor
           (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
         · (enriched_from_arr E₈
              (identity (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))))
            #⊗ identity
                 (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
            · lmap_e P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z)))
                (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))))) =
τ₁ z x
· (τ₂ (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
   · (τ₃ (G₂ (G₁ z)) (F₂ (F₁ x))
      · (mon_linvunitor
           (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
         · (enriched_from_arr E₄
              (identity (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
            #⊗ identity
                 (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
            · rmap_e P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z)))
                (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)))))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₂ E₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₃ E₄
G₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₅ E₆
G₂: C₆ ⟶ C₇
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₆ E₇
G₃: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₅
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₆
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₇
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EG₃ P₃ P₄
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_id ((G₁ ∙ G₂) ∙ G₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁ EG₂) EG₃)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁
     (functor_comp_enrichment EG₂ EG₃))
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_id ((F₁ ∙ F₂) ∙ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₂) EF₃)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁
     (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₃))
z: C₅
x: C₁
τ₁ z x
· (τ₂ (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
   · (τ₃ (G₂ (G₁ z)) (F₂ (F₁ x))
      · (mon_linvunitor
           (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
         · (enriched_id E₈ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z)))
            #⊗ identity
                 (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
            · lmap_e P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z)))
                (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))))) =
τ₁ z x
· (τ₂ (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
   · (τ₃ (G₂ (G₁ z)) (F₂ (F₁ x))
      · (mon_linvunitor
           (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
         · (enriched_id E₄ (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)))
            #⊗ identity
                 (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
            · rmap_e P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z)))
                (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)))))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₂ E₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₃ E₄
G₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₅ E₆
G₂: C₆ ⟶ C₇
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₆ E₇
G₃: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₅
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₆
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₇
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EG₃ P₃ P₄
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_id ((G₁ ∙ G₂) ∙ G₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁ EG₂) EG₃)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁
     (functor_comp_enrichment EG₂ EG₃))
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_id ((F₁ ∙ F₂) ∙ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment
     (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₂) EF₃)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁
     (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₃))
z: C₅
x: C₁
τ₁ z x
· (τ₂ (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
   · (τ₃ (G₂ (G₁ z)) (F₂ (F₁ x))
      · (mon_linvunitor
           (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
         · mon_lunitor
             (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))))) =
τ₁ z x
· (τ₂ (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
   · (τ₃ (G₂ (G₁ z)) (F₂ (F₁ x))
      · (mon_linvunitor
           (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
         · mon_lunitor
             (P₄ (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ z))) (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)))))))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃)
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square
     (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃) =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃)
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁
     (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃))


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃)
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square
     (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃) =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃)
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁
     (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₂
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂ =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ₁
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃) x₁ x₂
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
    (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V

EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
∏ y : C₃,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) x₁ x₂ y
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₂
   · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
       (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁
       x₂) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) x₁ x₂ y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ₁
     (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃) x₁ x₂
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
       (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂))

x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃
    x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂)
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor

· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ₁
     (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃) x₁ x₂
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
       (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂))

· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ₁
    (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃) x₁ x₂
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
    (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) x₁ x₂ x₃
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor τ₁
    (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃) x₁ x₂ =
?y'

    apply comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
τ₁ x₃ x₂
#⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)
    (F₂ x₃)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
    (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃
    x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂)
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
internal_transpose
  (τ₁ x₃ x₂
   #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
       (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)) =
internal_transpose
  (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
       x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂)
   · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
       (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁
       x₂)

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
∏ y : C₅,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ y
· internal_transpose
    (τ₁ x₃ x₂
     #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁)
         (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
         (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ y
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
         x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     · internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂)
     · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
         (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃
         x₁ x₂)

· internal_transpose

     #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁)

     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁

     · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor

E₈: enrichment C₈ V

EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P₁ x₃ x₂ ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
 · internal_transpose
     (τ₁ x₃ x₂
      #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁)
          (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
          (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂)) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
 · internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃
          x₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂)
      · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
          (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃
          x₁ x₂)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂))

x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P₁ x₃ x₂ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
 · internal_transpose
     (τ₁ x₃ x₂
      #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁)
          (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
          (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂)) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
 · internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃
          x₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂)
      · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
          (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃
          x₁ x₂)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂))

· internal_transpose
    (τ₁ x₃ x₂
     #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁)
         (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃

· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)

· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
         x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     · internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂)
     · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
         (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃
         x₁ x₂) #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P₁ x₃ x₂ ⟧
identity (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· internal_transpose
    (τ₁ x₃ x₂
     #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁)
         (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
         (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)) #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂)) =
identity (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
         x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     · internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂)
     · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
         (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃
         x₁ x₂) #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P₁ x₃ x₂ ⟧
identity (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   · (internal_transpose
        (τ₁ x₃ x₂
         #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁
              x₃
         · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁)
              (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)
            · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁
                Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)))
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃
             (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)))) =
identity (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   · (internal_transpose
        (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂
              P₃ x₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
            · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ x₁ x₂)
               · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
                   (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square
                      τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂)))
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃
             (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P₁ x₃ x₂ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
#⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· (internal_transpose
     (τ₁ x₃ x₂
      #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁)
           (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂
             Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)))
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
          (F₁ x₂))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
#⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· (internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃
           x₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 x₁ x₂)
            · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
                (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁
                   τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂)))
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
          (F₁ x₂)))

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
