τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
#⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· (internal_transpose
     (τ₁ x₃ x₂
      #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁)
           (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂
             Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)))
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
          (F₁ x₂))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
#⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· (internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃
           x₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 x₁ x₂)
            · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
                (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁
                   τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂)))
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
          (F₁ x₂)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
#⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
        (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (τ₁ x₃ x₂
         #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁
              x₃
         · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁)
              (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)
            · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁
                Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂))))
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
          (F₁ x₂))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
#⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
        (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂
              P₃ x₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
            · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ x₁ x₂)
               · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
                   (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square
                      τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂))))
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   · internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
          (F₁ x₂)))

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
#⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃) (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   · (τ₁ x₃ x₂
      #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁)
           (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂
             Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
#⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃) (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃
           x₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 x₁ x₂)
            · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
                (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁
                   τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
#⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃) (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· τ₁ x₃ x₂
  #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)
    (F₂ x₃)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
    (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
#⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃) (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃
    x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂)
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄) (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· τ₁ x₃ x₂
  #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)
    (F₂ x₃)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
    (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄) (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃
    x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂)
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄) (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· (identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
   · (τ₁ x₃ x₂
      #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁)
           (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂
             Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄) (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· (identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃
           x₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 x₁ x₂)
            · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
                (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁
                   τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂))))

x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (τ₁ x₃ x₂
   #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁)
        (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
          (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂))) =
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
        x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁
              x₂)
         · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
             (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
             τ₃ x₁ x₂)))

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (τ₁ x₃ x₂
   #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁

        (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
          (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂))) = ?b

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆

x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
?b =
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
        x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁
              x₂)
         · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
             (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
             τ₃ x₁ x₂)))

   #⊗ comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃

        (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃)

#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃ = 
?t2

    apply comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor_comm.

τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
τ₁ x₃ x₂
#⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
        (F₂ x₃) (F₃ x₄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)
    (F₂ x₃)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
    (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂) =
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
        x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁
              x₂)
         · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
             (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
             τ₃ x₁ x₂)))

x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
τ₁ x₃ x₂
#⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
        (F₂ x₃) (F₃ x₄))
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)
     (F₂ x₃)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
       (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)) =
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
        x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁
              x₂)
         · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor

identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)

              x₂)
         · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor

x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₂ Q₃) (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)
  (F₂ x₃)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
    (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂) = ?t2

    apply (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data_comm Q₁ Q₂ Q₃).

x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
τ₁ x₃ x₂
#⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
        (F₂ x₃) (F₃ x₄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
        (F₂ x₃))
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
       (F₄ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
   · internal_eval (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
          (F₁ x₂))) =
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
        x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁
              x₂)
         · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
             (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
             τ₃ x₁ x₂)))

x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· identity
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₁ EF₂ Q₁ x₃ x₂)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₂ x₃)
       (F₃ x₄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
        (F₂ x₃))
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
       (F₄ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
   · internal_eval (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
          (F₁ x₂))) = ?b

E₈: enrichment C₈ V

EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈

τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· (identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₁ EF₂ Q₁ x₃ x₂)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
        (F₂ x₃) (F₃ x₄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
           (F₂ x₃))
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
           (F₄ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂)
         #⊗ identity (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
         · internal_eval (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃
                (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂))))) = ?b

identity
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₁ EF₂ Q₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₂ x₃)
     (F₃ x₄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
        (F₂ x₃))
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
        (F₄ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))

          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃
             (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)))) = ?t2

· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)

EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
sym_mon_braiding V
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₁ EF₂ Q₁ x₃ x₂)
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₂ EF₃ Q₂ x₄ x₃
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₃ EF₄ Q₃ x₁ x₄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₂ x₃)
    (F₃ x₄)
  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₁ EF₂ Q₁ x₃ x₂)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
    (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) #⊗ identity (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
· internal_eval (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂)) = ?t2

E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V

EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
sym_mon_braiding V
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₁ EF₂ Q₁ x₃ x₂)
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₂ EF₃ Q₂ x₄ x₃
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₃ EF₄ Q₃ x₁ x₄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₂ x₃)
     (F₃ x₄)
   #⊗ identity
        (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₁ EF₂ Q₁ x₃ x₂)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
        (F₄ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
      · internal_eval (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃
             (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂)))) = ?t2

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₂ x₃)
  (F₃ x₄)
#⊗ identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₁ EF₂ Q₁ x₃ x₂)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
     (F₄ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
   · internal_eval (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
          (F₁ x₂))) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₂ x₃)
  (F₃ x₄)
#⊗ identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₁ EF₂ Q₁ x₃ x₂)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
    (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) #⊗ identity (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
· internal_eval (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂)) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₂ x₃)
   (F₃ x₄)
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
     (F₄ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
#⊗ identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₁ EF₂ Q₁ x₃ x₂)
· internal_eval (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂)) = ?t2

    apply (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm Q₁ Q₂ Q₃).
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₁ EF₂ Q₁ x₃ x₂)
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₂ EF₃ Q₂ x₄ x₃
      ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₃ EF₄ Q₃ x₁ x₄)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
       (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂)) =
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
        x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁
              x₂)
         · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
             (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
             τ₃ x₁ x₂)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
     (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃) ⊗ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
       (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂)) =
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
        x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁
              x₂)
         · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
             (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
             τ₃ x₁ x₂)))

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
     (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃) ⊗ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
       (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂)) = ?b

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
?b =
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
        x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁
              x₂)
         · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
             (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
             τ₃ x₁ x₂)))

     (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃) ⊗ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))

x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅

  (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃) ⊗ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
    (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) = ?t2

F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
  (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃) ⊗ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃) ⊗ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
     (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
   · mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
       (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
       (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂) (F₃ x₄)) = ?t2

x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
  (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃) ⊗ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃) ⊗ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
    (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
· mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
    (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
    (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
    (F₁ x₂) (F₃ x₄) = ?t2

x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
identity
  (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂)
   ⊗ (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃) ⊗ Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄)))
· mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
    (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
    (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
    (F₁ x₂) (F₃ x₄) = ?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
  (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
    (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
    (F₁ x₂) (F₃ x₄) = ?t2

    apply idpath.

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· (mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
     (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
       (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂) (F₃ x₄)) =
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
        x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁
              x₂)
         · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
             (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
             τ₃ x₁ x₂)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
        x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁
              x₂)
         · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
             (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
             τ₃ x₁ x₂))) =
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· (mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
     (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
       (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂) (F₃ x₄))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
        x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁
              x₂)
         · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
             (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
             τ₃ x₁ x₂))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
?b =
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· (mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
     (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
       (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂) (F₃ x₄))

  
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V

EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
        x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁
              x₂)
         · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
             (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
             τ₃ x₁ x₂))) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V

EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃
    x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂)
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂ =
?b

x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃
    x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂)
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂ =
?b

x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
        x₃ x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob

              x₂)
         · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
             (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
             τ₃ x₁ x₂))) = ?b

#⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃
     x₂ #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   · (internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)

           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂)
      · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor

#⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)

· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor

EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃ x₄
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃
     x₂) #⊗ identity (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· internal_eval (P₁ x₃ x₂)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂) =
?y'

    apply (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm P₁ P₂ P₃).
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
     x₄ x₃ x₂
   · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
       (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁
       x₂) =
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· (mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
     (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
       (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂) (F₃ x₄))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₈: enrichment C₈ V

EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
     x₄ x₃ x₂
   · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
       (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁
       x₂) = ?b

E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
?b =
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· (mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
     (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
       (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂) (F₃ x₄))

x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄) (P₁ x₃ x₂)
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃) (P₃ x₁ x₄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x₄ x₂ x₃
     #⊗ identity (P₃ x₁ x₄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂ x₄
   · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
       (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁
       x₂) = ?b

x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄) (P₁ x₃ x₂)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃) (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x₄ x₂ x₃
  #⊗ identity (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂ x₄
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂ =
?b

EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
identity (P₁ x₃ x₂ ⊗ (P₂ x₄ x₃ ⊗ P₃ x₁ x₄))
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃) (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x₄ x₂ x₃
  #⊗ identity (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂ x₄
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂ =
?b

  #⊗ identity (P₃ x₁ x₄)

x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
mon_rassociator (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃) (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x₄ x₂ x₃
   #⊗ identity (P₃ x₁ x₄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂ x₄
      · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
          (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃
          x₁ x₂)) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₁ x₂ x₄
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂ =
?t2

    apply (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor_comm
             (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂)
             τ₃).
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
mon_rassociator (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃) (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x₄ x₂ x₃
   #⊗ identity (P₃ x₁ x₄)
   · (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂ x₄ x₂
      #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
          (F₁ x₂) (F₃ x₄))) =
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· (mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
     (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
       (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
       (F₁ x₂) (F₃ x₄))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
mon_rassociator (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃) (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x₄ x₂ x₃
  #⊗ identity (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂ x₄ x₂
  #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
    (F₁ x₂) (F₃ x₄) =
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
    (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
    (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
    (F₁ x₂) (F₃ x₄)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
mon_rassociator (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃) (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x₄ x₂ x₃
  #⊗ identity (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂ x₄ x₂
  #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄ =
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
    (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
    (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
mon_rassociator (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃) (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x₄ x₂ x₃
  #⊗ identity (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂ x₄ x₂
  #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄ = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
?b =
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
    (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
    (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))

  #⊗ identity (P₃ x₁ x₄)

· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x₄ x₂ x₃
   #⊗ identity (P₃ x₁ x₄)
   · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂ x₄ x₂
     #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄) = ?b

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x₄ x₂ x₃
#⊗ identity (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂ x₄ x₂
  #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄ = ?t2

E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x₄ x₂ x₃
 · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂ x₄ x₂)
#⊗ (identity (P₃ x₁ x₄) · τ₃ x₁ x₄) = ?t2

E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆

EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x₄ x₂ x₃
 · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂ x₄ x₂)
#⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄ = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x₄ x₂ x₃
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂ x₄ x₂ = 
?y'

    apply comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
mon_rassociator (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃) (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· (τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ τ₂ x₄ x₃
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
       (F₂ x₃)) #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄ =
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
    (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
    (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
mon_rassociator (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃) (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· ((τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ τ₂ x₄ x₃) #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
       (F₂ x₃)
     #⊗ identity
          (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₃ EF₄ Q₃ x₁
             x₄)) =
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
    (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
    (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
mon_rassociator (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃) (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· (τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ τ₂ x₄ x₃) #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
    (F₂ x₃)
  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₃ EF₄ Q₃ x₁ x₄) =
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
    (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₁ x₂)
    (F₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
mon_rassociator (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃) (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· (τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ τ₂ x₄ x₃) #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄ =
τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ (τ₂ x₄ x₃ #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄)
· mon_rassociator (Q₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂))
    (Q₂ (F₃ x₄) (F₂ x₃)) (Q₃ (F₄ x₁) (F₃ x₄))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
E₇: enrichment C₇ V
E₈: enrichment C₈ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₇ E₈
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₅ E₇
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
Q₃: enriched_profunctor E₆ E₈
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₄ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
x₄: C₅
mon_rassociator (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃) (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· (τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ τ₂ x₄ x₃) #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄ =
mon_rassociator (P₁ x₃ x₂) (P₂ x₄ x₃) (P₃ x₁ x₄)
· (τ₁ x₃ x₂ #⊗ τ₂ x₄ x₃) #⊗ τ₃ x₁ x₄

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 5. Composition and whiskering *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
C₂: category
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
C₃: category
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
     (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ₁ P₁')
     (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P₂ τ₂))
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square s₁' s₂') =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
     (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor θ₁ Q₁')
     (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q₂ θ₂))
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square s₁ s₂)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
C₂: category
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
C₃: category
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
     (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ₁ P₁')
     (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P₂ τ₂))
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square s₁' s₂') =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
     (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor θ₁ Q₁')
     (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q₂ θ₂))
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square s₁ s₂)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
C₂: category
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
C₃: category
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor τ₁ P₁' z x
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ τ₂ z x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁' s₂' z x =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ z x
· (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ z)
     (F₁ x)
   · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ z)
       (F₁ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos

EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
∏ y : C₃,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₁' z x y
· (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor τ₁ P₁' z x
   · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ τ₂ z x
   · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁' s₂' z x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₁' z x y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ z x
   · (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ z)
        (F₁ x)
      · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ z)
          (F₁ x)))

s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'

p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₁' z x y
· (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor τ₁ P₁' z x
   · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ τ₂ z x
   · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁' s₂' z x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₁' z x y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ z x
   · (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ z)
        (F₁ x)
      · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ z)
          (F₁ x)))

q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =

x: C₁
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₁' z x y
· (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor τ₁ P₁' z x
   · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ τ₂ z x
   · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁' s₂' z x) =
?b

P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'

p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =

q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₁' z x y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ z x
   · (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ z)
        (F₁ x)
      · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ z)
          (F₁ x)))

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₁' z x y
· (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor τ₁ P₁' z x
   · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ τ₂ z x
   · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁' s₂' z x) =

F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₁' z x y
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor τ₁ P₁' z x
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ τ₂ z x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁' s₂' z x =
?b

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'

p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =

z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
τ₁ y x #⊗ identity (P₁' z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₁' z x y
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ τ₂ z x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁' s₂' z x =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₁' z x y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ z x
   · (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ z)
        (F₁ x)
      · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ z)
          (F₁ x)))

x: C₁
y: C₃
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₁' z x y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ z x
   · (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ z)
        (F₁ x)
      · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ z)
          (F₁ x)))

rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
τ₁ y x #⊗ identity (P₁' z y)
· (identity (P₂ y x) #⊗ τ₂ z y
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₂' z x y
      · comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁' s₂'
          z x)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₁' z x y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ z x
   · (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ z)
        (F₁ x)
      · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ z)
          (F₁ x)))

y: C₃

· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁' s₂' z x =
?t2

    apply comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor_comm.

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₁' z x y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ z x =
?y'

    apply comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
C₂: category
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

E₄: enrichment C₄ V

E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
s₁ y x #⊗ s₂ z y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₁' (F₃ z) (F₁ x)
    (F₂ y)
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ z)
    (F₁ x)
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₁ x) =
τ₁ y x #⊗ identity (P₁' z y)
· (identity (P₂ y x) #⊗ τ₂ z y
   · (s₁' y x #⊗ s₂' z y
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₃ z)
          (F₁ x) (F₂ y)))

F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
?b =
τ₁ y x #⊗ identity (P₁' z y)
· (identity (P₂ y x) #⊗ τ₂ z y
   · (s₁' y x #⊗ s₂' z y
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₃ z)
          (F₁ x) (F₂ y)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
C₂: category
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
C₃: category
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
s₁ y x #⊗ s₂ z y
· (θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q₁' (F₃ z) (F₂ y))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₁' (F₃ z) (F₁ x)
       (F₂ y)
   · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ z)
       (F₁ x)) = ?b

C₁: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
C₂: category
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
C₃: category
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
s₁ y x #⊗ s₂ z y
· (θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q₁' (F₃ z) (F₂ y))
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₁' (F₃ z) (F₁ x)
        (F₂ y)
      · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ z)
          (F₁ x))) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
C₂: category
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
C₃: category
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₁' (F₃ z) (F₁ x)
  (F₂ y)
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₁ x) =
?t2

    apply lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
C₂: category
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
C₃: category
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
s₁ y x #⊗ s₂ z y
· (θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q₁' (F₃ z) (F₂ y))
   · (identity (Q₂ (F₂ y) (F₁ x)) #⊗ θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₃ z)
          (F₁ x) (F₂ y))) =
τ₁ y x #⊗ identity (P₁' z y)
· (identity (P₂ y x) #⊗ τ₂ z y
   · (s₁' y x #⊗ s₂' z y
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₃ z)
          (F₁ x) (F₂ y)))

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
s₁ y x #⊗ s₂ z y
· θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q₁' (F₃ z) (F₂ y))
· identity (Q₂ (F₂ y) (F₁ x)) #⊗ θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₃ z) (F₁ x)
    (F₂ y) =
τ₁ y x #⊗ identity (P₁' z y)
· identity (P₂ y x) #⊗ τ₂ z y · s₁' y x #⊗ s₂' z y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₃ z) (F₁ x)
    (F₂ y)

F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄

P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'

p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
s₁ y x #⊗ s₂ z y
· θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q₁' (F₃ z) (F₂ y))
· identity (Q₂ (F₂ y) (F₁ x)) #⊗ θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y) =
τ₁ y x #⊗ identity (P₁' z y)
· identity (P₂ y x) #⊗ τ₂ z y · s₁' y x #⊗ s₂' z y

E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
(s₁ y x · θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x)
 · identity (Q₂ (F₂ y) (F₁ x)))
#⊗ (s₂ z y · identity (Q₁' (F₃ z) (F₂ y))
    · θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y)) =
(τ₁ y x · identity (P₂ y x) · s₁' y x)
#⊗ (identity (P₁' z y) · τ₂ z y · s₂' z y)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
