E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
(s₁ y x · θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x))
#⊗ (s₂ z y · θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y)) =
(τ₁ y x · s₁' y x) #⊗ (τ₂ z y · s₂' z y)

C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
p':= from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation p y x: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' y x =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ y x
(s₁ y x · θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x))
#⊗ (s₂ z y · θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y)) =
(τ₁ y x · s₁' y x) #⊗ (τ₂ z y · s₂' z y)

F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
p':= from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation p y x: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' y x =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ y x
q':= from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation q z y: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' z y =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ z y
(s₁ y x · θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x))
#⊗ (s₂ z y · θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y)) =
(τ₁ y x · s₁' y x) #⊗ (τ₂ z y · s₂' z y)

  
V: benabou_cosmos

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆

τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
p':= from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation p y x: τ₁ y x · s₁' y x = s₁ y x · θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x)
q':= from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation q z y: τ₂ z y · s₂' z y = s₂ z y · θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y)
(s₁ y x · θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x))
#⊗ (s₂ z y · θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y)) =
(τ₁ y x · s₁' y x) #⊗ (τ₂ z y · s₂' z y)

z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
p':= from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation p y x: τ₁ y x · s₁' y x = s₁ y x · θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x)
q':= from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation q z y: τ₂ z y · s₂' z y = s₂ z y · θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y)
?b =
(s₁ y x · θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x))
#⊗ (s₂ z y · θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y))

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
p':= from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation p y x: τ₁ y x · s₁' y x = s₁ y x · θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x)
q':= from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation q z y: τ₂ z y · s₂' z y = s₂ z y · θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y)
τ₁ y x · s₁' y x = ?y'

    exact p'.

rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
p':= from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation p y x: τ₁ y x · s₁' y x = s₁ y x · θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x)
q':= from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation q z y: τ₂ z y · s₂' z y = s₂ z y · θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y)
(s₁ y x · θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x)) #⊗ (τ₂ z y · s₂' z y) =
(s₁ y x · θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x))
#⊗ (s₂ z y · θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁: category

C₂: category

C₃: category
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₃ E₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₅ E₆
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₁', P₂': enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₁', Q₂': enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
τ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁' P₂'
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₁ Q₁
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₂ P₂ Q₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₃ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
p':= from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation p y x: τ₁ y x · s₁' y x = s₁ y x · θ₁ (F₂ y) (F₁ x)
q':= from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation q z y: τ₂ z y · s₂' z y = s₂ z y · θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y)
τ₂ z y · s₂' z y = s₂ z y · θ₂ (F₃ z) (F₂ y)

  exact q'.
Qed.


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
C₂: category
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
C₃: category
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
F₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₂ E₃
F₄: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅
F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₁
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square s₁ s₂) =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₂
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square s₁' s₂')


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
C₂: category
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category

E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
F₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₂ E₃
F₄: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅
F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₁
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square s₁ s₂) =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square H₂
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square s₁' s₂')

EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
F₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₂ E₃
F₄: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅
F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁ z x · s₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· enriched_from_arr E₆
    (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z) · # (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) =
s₁' z x · s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
· mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· enriched_from_arr E₃
    (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))

     (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z) · # (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))

F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
F₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₂ E₃
F₄: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅
F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E₆ (# (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
    · enriched_comp E₆ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₇ (F₆ z))
        (F₇ (F₅ z)))
   #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
   · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))) =
?t2

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂

q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
   · ((enriched_from_arr E₆ (# (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))
       #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z)))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           (E₆ ⦃ F₇ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₅ z) ⦄)
           (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
         · mon_lassociator
             (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
             (E₆ ⦃ F₇ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₅ z) ⦄)
             (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
         · identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₇ (F₆ z))
                (F₃ (F₁ x))
         · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z))
             (F₃ (F₁ x))))) = ?t2

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂

q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· (enriched_from_arr E₆ (# (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z)))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ F₇ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₅ z) ⦄)
    (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· mon_lassociator (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
    (E₆ ⦃ F₇ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₅ z) ⦄)
    (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))
· lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) = 
?t2

  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))

z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· (enriched_from_arr E₆ (# (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z)))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ F₇ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₅ z) ⦄)
    (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· mon_lassociator (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
    (E₆ ⦃ F₇ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₅ z) ⦄)
    (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))) = ?y'

EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₂ E₃
F₄: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅
F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} I_{ V}
      · enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
        #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₆
             (# (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z)))
     #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))) = ?y'0

· mon_rinvunitor I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))) = ?y'0

      apply idpath.

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· identity I_{ V}
  #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))) = 
?y'

    apply idpath.

E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
F₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₂ E₃
F₄: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅
F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁ z x
· (s₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
      · identity I_{ V}
        #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
      · enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
        #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₆
              (# (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))
            #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))
      · identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
        #⊗ lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₇ (F₆ z))
             (F₃ (F₁ x))
      · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))) =
s₁' z x · s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
· mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· enriched_from_arr E₃
    (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))

θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂

p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁ z x
· (s₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
      · (identity I_{ V}
         #⊗ mon_linvunitor
              (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
         · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
            #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₆
                  (# (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))
                #⊗ identity
                     (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))
            · (identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
               #⊗ lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₇ (F₆ z))
                    (F₃ (F₁ x))
               · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z))
                   (F₃ (F₁ x))))))) =
s₁' z x
· (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₃
           (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
         · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))
             (F₃ (F₁ x)))))

  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)

H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)

z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁ z x
· (s₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
      · (identity I_{ V}
         #⊗ mon_linvunitor
              (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
         · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
            #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₆
                  (# (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))
                #⊗ identity
                     (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))
            · (identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
               #⊗ lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₇ (F₆ z))
                    (F₃ (F₁ x))
               · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z))
                   (F₃ (F₁ x))))))) = ?b

  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))

  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)

z: C₄
x: C₁
?b =
s₁' z x
· (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₃
           (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
         · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))
             (F₃ (F₁ x)))))

x: C₁
s₁ z x
· (s₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
      · (identity I_{ V}
         #⊗ mon_linvunitor
              (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
         · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
            #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₆
                  (# (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))
                #⊗ identity
                     (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))
            · (identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
               #⊗ lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₇ (F₆ z))
                    (F₃ (F₁ x))
               · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z))
                   (F₃ (F₁ x))))))) = ?b

θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
   · (identity I_{ V}
      #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
         #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₆
               (# (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))
             #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))
         · (identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₇ (F₆ z))
                 (F₃ (F₁ x))
            · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z))
                (F₃ (F₁ x)))))) = ?t2

  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₆ (# (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))

· lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) =

θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ (s₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x)
    · mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))
· enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₆ (# (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))
· identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))
· lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) = 
?t2

· identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))
· lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) = 
?t2

Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
#⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
  #⊗ (s₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x)
      · mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))
· identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₆ (# (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))
· identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x))
· lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) = 
?t2

              (F₃ (F₁ x))
         · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z))
             (F₃ (F₁ x))))) = ?t2

s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· enriched_from_arr E₆ (# (pr1 F₇) (pr1 θ₁ z))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) = 
?t2

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₅ (pr1 θ₁ z)
#⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
· EF₇ (F₆ z) (F₅ z) #⊗ s₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x)
· lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) = 
?t2

  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))

H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
EF₇ (F₆ z) (F₅ z) #⊗ s₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x)
· lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₅ z)) (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) = 
?t2

    exact (enriched_profunctor_square_lmap_e s₂ (F₅ z) (F₆ z) (F₁ x)).

F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
F₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃

EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅

EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆

τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
      #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
      · (identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
         #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
             · (enriched_from_arr E₅ (pr1 θ₁ z)
                #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
                · (lmap_e P₂ (F₅ z) (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
                   · s₂ (F₆ z) (F₁ x))))
         · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z))
             (F₃ (F₁ x))))) =
s₁' z x
· (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₃
           (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
         · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))
             (F₃ (F₁ x)))))

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
      #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
      · (identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
         #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
             · (enriched_from_arr E₅ (pr1 θ₁ z)
                #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
                · (lmap_e P₂ (F₅ z) (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
                   · s₂ (F₆ z) (F₁ x))))
         · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z))
             (F₃ (F₁ x))))) = ?b

EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆

θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂

p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
?b =
s₁' z x
· (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₃
           (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
         · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))
             (F₃ (F₁ x)))))

  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
      #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
      · (identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
         #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
             · (enriched_from_arr E₅ (pr1 θ₁ z)
                #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
                · (lmap_e P₂ (F₅ z) (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
                   · s₂ (F₆ z) (F₁ x))))
         · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z))
             (F₃ (F₁ x))))) = ?b

#⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
· (identity (E₆ ⦃ F₈ (F₆ z), F₇ (F₆ z) ⦄)
   #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂

q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)

  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
   · (identity I_{ V}
      #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
          · enriched_from_arr E₅ (pr1 θ₁ z)
            #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
          · lmap_e P₂ (F₅ z) (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
          · s₂ (F₆ z) (F₁ x))
      · enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
        #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
      · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))) =
s₁' z x
· (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₃
           (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
         · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))
             (F₃ (F₁ x)))))

      #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
          · enriched_from_arr E₅ (pr1 θ₁ z)
            #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
          · lmap_e P₂ (F₅ z) (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
          · s₂ (F₆ z) (F₁ x))
      · enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
        #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
      · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
C₂: category
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
C₃: category
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
F₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₂ E₃
F₄: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅
F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
?b =
s₁' z x
· (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₃
           (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
         · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))
             (F₃ (F₁ x)))))

  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)

z: C₄
x: C₁

· (enriched_from_arr E₅ (pr1 θ₁ z)
   #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
   · (lmap_e P₂ (F₅ z) (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
      · (s₂ (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
         · (mon_linvunitor
              (P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
            · (enriched_from_arr E₆
                 (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
               #⊗ identity

               · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z))
                   (F₃ (F₁ x))))))) = ?t2

EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₂ E₃
F₄: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅
F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₂ (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
      · lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))) =
?t2

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₂ (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· enriched_from_arr E₆ (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 F₆ z))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))
· lmap_e P₃ (F₇ (F₆ z)) (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) = 
?t2

    exact (from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation q (F₆ z) (F₁ x)).

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂

q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₅ (pr1 θ₁ z)
      #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
      · (lmap_e P₂ (F₅ z) (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
         · uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
             (F₆ z) (F₁ x)))) =
s₁' z x
· (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₃
           (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
         · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))
             (F₃ (F₁ x)))))

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₅ (pr1 θ₁ z)
      #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
      · (lmap_e P₂ (F₅ z) (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
         · (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
            · mon_linvunitor
                (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
            · enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
              #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
            · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
                (F₃ (F₁ x)))))) =
s₁' z x
· (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₃
           (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
         · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))
             (F₃ (F₁ x)))))

z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₅ (pr1 θ₁ z)
      #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
      · (lmap_e P₂ (F₅ z) (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
         · (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₁ x)

            · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
                (F₃ (F₁ x)))))) = ?b

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)

H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
?b =
s₁' z x
· (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₃
           (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
         · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))
             (F₃ (F₁ x)))))

Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₅ (pr1 θ₁ z)
      #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
      · (lmap_e P₂ (F₅ z) (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
         · (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
            · mon_linvunitor
                (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
            · enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
              #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
            · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
                (F₃ (F₁ x)))))) = ?b

z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁ z x · mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₅ (pr1 θ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
· lmap_e P₂ (F₅ z) (F₆ z) (F₁ x) · s₂' (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
· enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) = 
?b

z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁ z x · mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₅ (pr1 θ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₅ z) (F₁ x))
· lmap_e P₂ (F₅ z) (F₆ z) (F₁ x) = ?y'

    exact (from_eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation p z x).

  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))

z: C₄
x: C₁
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁' z x
· s₂' (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
· enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) =
s₁' z x
· (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₃
           (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
         · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))
             (F₃ (F₁ x)))))

z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁' z x · mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
· rmap_e P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x) (F₁ x) · s₂' (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
· enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) =
s₁' z x
· (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₃
           (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
         · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))
             (F₃ (F₁ x)))))

  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)

  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₁' z x
· (mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
      #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
      · (rmap_e P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
         · (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
            · (mon_linvunitor
                 (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
               · (enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
                  #⊗ identity
                       (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
                  · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
                      (F₃ (F₁ x)))))))) =
s₁' z x
· (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₃
           (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))

Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
   · (rmap_e P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
      · (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
         · (mon_linvunitor
              (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
            · (enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
               #⊗ identity
                    (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
               · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
                   (F₃ (F₁ x))))))) =
s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₃
        (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))

z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
   · (rmap_e P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
      · (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₁ x)

            · (enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))

               · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
                   (F₃ (F₁ x))))))) = ?b

z: C₄
x: C₁
?b =
s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₃
        (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))

z: C₄
x: C₁
rmap_e P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
· (s₂' (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
         · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
             (F₃ (F₁ x))))) = ?t2

z: C₄
x: C₁
rmap_e P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x) (F₁ x) · s₂' (F₆ z) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
· enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) = 
?t2

     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
rmap_e P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x) (F₁ x) · s₂' (F₆ z) (F₁ x) =
?y'

    exact (!(enriched_profunctor_square_rmap_e s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x) (F₁ x))).
  
V: benabou_cosmos

F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂

EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅

EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
   · (EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x) #⊗ s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
      · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
      · mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
      · enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
        #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
      · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))) =
s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₃
        (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))

x: C₁
?b =

· (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₃
        (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))

E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
F₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₂ E₃
F₄: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅
F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₁ x ⦄) #⊗ s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
   · EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))) = ?y'

  #⊗ identity (P₂ (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₁ x ⦄) #⊗ s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
· EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))) = ?y'

E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
F₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₂ E₃
F₄: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅
F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
· mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))) = ?y'

    apply idpath.

θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
· mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
· enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) =
s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₃
        (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
      #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · (EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
         · (rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))
              (F₄ (F₁ x))
            · (mon_linvunitor
                 (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
               · (enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
                  #⊗ identity
                       (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
                  · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
                      (F₃ (F₁ x)))))))) =
s₂' (F₆ z) (F₂ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₃
        (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
      #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
      · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))))

q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· (EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
   · (rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
      · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
         · (enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
            #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
            · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
                (F₃ (F₁ x)))))) =
enriched_from_arr E₃
  (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
#⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂

q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· (EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
   · (rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
      · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
         · (enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
            #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
            · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
                (F₃ (F₁ x)))))) =
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₃ (# (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₃ (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x))
 · enriched_comp E₃ (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₂ x))
     (F₃ (F₁ x)))
#⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))

z: C₄
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· (EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
   · (rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
      · (mon_linvunitor (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
         · (enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
            #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
            · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
                (F₃ (F₁ x)))))) = ?b

EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
?b =
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₃ (# (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₃ (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x))
 · enriched_comp E₃ (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₂ x))
     (F₃ (F₁ x)))
#⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))

F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃

uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄)
#⊗ identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₄ EF₈ P₃ (F₆ z)
        (F₂ x))
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V}
     (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄)
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₄ EF₈ P₃ (F₆ z)
        (F₂ x))
   · (identity I_{ V}
      #⊗ rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
         #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
         · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
             (F₃ (F₁ x))))) = ?t2

  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) = 
?t20

F₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₂ E₃
F₄: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅
F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
(enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
 #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄))
#⊗ identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₄ EF₈ P₃ (F₆ z)
        (F₂ x))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₁ x), F₃ (F₁ x) ⦄)
     (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄)
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₄ EF₈ P₃ (F₆ z)
        (F₂ x))
   · (identity (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₁ x), F₃ (F₁ x) ⦄)
      #⊗ rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
      · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x)))) =
?t2

  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))

z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₁ x), F₃ (F₁ x) ⦄)
  (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄)
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₄ EF₈ P₃ (F₆ z)
     (F₂ x))
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₁ x), F₃ (F₁ x) ⦄)
   #⊗ rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
   · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))) =

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))

H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₁ x), F₃ (F₁ x) ⦄)
  (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄)
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₄ EF₈ P₃ (F₆ z)
     (F₂ x))
· identity (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₁ x), F₃ (F₁ x) ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₁ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) = 
?t2

    exact (!(rmap_e_comp P₃ (F₈(F₆ z)) (F₄(F₂ x)) (F₄(F₁ x)) (F₃(F₁ x)))).

Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃

θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· (EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
   · (mon_linvunitor (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄)
      #⊗ identity
           (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₄ EF₈ P₃
              (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
      · ((enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
          #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄))
         #⊗ identity
              (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₄ EF₈ P₃
                 (F₆ z) (F₂ x))
         · (enriched_comp E₃ (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₄ (F₁ x))
              (F₃ (F₁ x))
            #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
            · rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))
                (F₃ (F₁ x)))))) =
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₃ (# (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₃ (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x))
 · enriched_comp E₃ (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₂ x))
     (F₃ (F₁ x)))
#⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂

q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· mon_linvunitor (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄)
  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₄ EF₈ P₃ (F₆ z)
          (F₂ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄))
  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₄ EF₈ P₃ (F₆ z)
          (F₂ x))
· enriched_comp E₃ (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₄ (F₁ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) =
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₃ (# (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₃ (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x))
 · enriched_comp E₃ (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₂ x))
     (F₃ (F₁ x)))
#⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· rmap_e P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))

s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂

q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =

H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)

  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)

  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))
· mon_linvunitor (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄)
  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₄ EF₈ P₃ (F₆ z)
          (F₂ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄))
  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF₄ EF₈ P₃ (F₆ z)
          (F₂ x))
· enriched_comp E₃ (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₄ (F₁ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x))) =
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₃ (# (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x))
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₃ (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x))
 · enriched_comp E₃ (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₂ x))
     (F₃ (F₁ x)))
#⊗ identity (P₃ (F₈ (F₆ z)) (F₄ (F₂ x)))

uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'

  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)

  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
(enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x) · EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)

   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄)

     (F₃ (F₁ x)))

  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x) · EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₃ (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₄ (F₁ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x)) =
mon_rinvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr1 τ₁ x) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· EF₃ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₃ (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x))
· enriched_comp E₃ (F₄ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₂ x)) (F₃ (F₁ x))
