· mon_linvunitor (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₁ x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
C₂: category
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
C₃: category
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
F₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₂ E₃
F₄: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅
F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₁ x ⦄)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₁ x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
C₂: category
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
C₃: category
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
F₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₂ E₃
F₄: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅
F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₁ x ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)
   · enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
     #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ F₄ (F₂ x), F₄ (F₁ x) ⦄)) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₁ x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
C₂: category
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
C₃: category
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
C₄: category
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
C₅: category
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
C₆: category
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
F₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₂ E₃
F₄: C₂ ⟶ C₃
EF₄: functor_enrichment F₄ E₂ E₃
F₅: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₅: functor_enrichment F₅ E₄ E₅
F₆: C₄ ⟶ C₅
EF₆: functor_enrichment F₆ E₄ E₅
F₇, F₈: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EF₇: functor_enrichment F₇ E₅ E₆
EF₈: functor_enrichment F₈ E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₄
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₅
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Eτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₂ EF₁
τ₂: F₄ ⟹ F₃
Eτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₄ EF₃
θ₁: F₆ ⟹ F₅
Eθ₁: nat_trans_enrichment θ₁ EF₆ EF₅
θ₂: F₈ ⟹ pr1 F₇
Eθ₂: nat_trans_enrichment θ₂ EF₈ EF₇
s₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EF₅ P₁ P₂
s₁': enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EF₆ P₁ P₂
s₂: enriched_profunctor_square EF₃ EF₇ P₂ P₃
s₂': enriched_profunctor_square EF₄ EF₈ P₂ P₃
p: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eθ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Eτ₂ s₂'
H₁: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₆ ∙ F₈) (F₆ ∙ F₇) (F₅ ∙ F₇)
     (pre_whisker F₆ θ₂) (post_whisker θ₁ F₇))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₆ EF₈)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₅ EF₇)
H₂: nat_trans_enrichment
  (nat_trans_comp (F₂ ∙ F₄) (F₂ ∙ F₃) (F₁ ∙ F₃)
     (pre_whisker F₂ τ₂) (post_whisker τ₁ F₃))
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₂ EF₄)
  (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₃)
z: C₄
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₁ x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₁ x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₃ (τ₂ (F₁ x))
  #⊗ EF₄ (F₂ x) (F₁ x)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 6. Saturation of the Verity double bicategory of enriched profunctors *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
square_to_enriched_nat_trans_data
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ
     (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF)) x = τ x


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
square_to_enriched_nat_trans_data
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ
     (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF)) x = τ x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (enriched_id E₁ x
   · (EF x x · mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
      · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (G x))) = τ x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (enriched_id E₁ x
   · (EF x x · mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
      · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (G x))) =
enriched_to_arr E₂ (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
enriched_id E₁ x
· (EF x x · mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
     #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (G x)) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
enriched_id E₁ x · EF x x
· mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (G x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
enriched_id E₂ (F x)
· mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (G x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (G x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (G x))) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (G x))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
?b = enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (G x))) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (G x)) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (G x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (G x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (G x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (G x)) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (mon_runitor I_{ V} · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} · mon_runitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
mon_rinvunitor I_{ V} · mon_runitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: F ⟹ G
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
identity I_{ V} · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

  apply id_left.
Qed.


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
EG x y · mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂
    (square_to_enriched_nat_trans_data τ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) = τ x y


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
EG x y · mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂
    (square_to_enriched_nat_trans_data τ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) = τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
EG x y · mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂
    (enriched_to_arr E₂ (enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y))
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) = τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
EG x y · mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) = τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
· (enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) = τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
   · τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄))
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) = τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))) =
τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p:= enriched_profunctor_square_lmap_e τ y x y: EG x y #⊗ τ y y
· lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) (G y)
    (G x) (F y) =
lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) y x y
· τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))) =
τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p:= enriched_profunctor_square_lmap_e τ y x y: EG x y #⊗ τ y y
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ G y, F y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))) =
τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: EG x y #⊗ τ y y
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ G y, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))) =
τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))) =
τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄),
         E₂ ⦃ G x, F y ⦄ ⟧,
   sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · z) p: (λ z : V ⟦ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄),
       E₂ ⦃ G x, F y ⦄ ⟧,
 sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
 · z)
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
   · τ y y #⊗ EG x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)) =
(λ z : V ⟦ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄),
       E₂ ⦃ G x, F y ⦄ ⟧,
 sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
 · z)
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y)
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))) =
τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄),
         E₂ ⦃ G x, F y ⦄ ⟧,
   sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · z) p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
   · τ y y #⊗ EG x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y)
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))) =
τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))) =
τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: identity ((E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))) =
τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))) =
τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))) = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
?b = τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))) = 
?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
   · (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y))) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) = ?t2

q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) #⊗ EG x y
· τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) #⊗ EG x y
   · (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y))) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
identity (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) #⊗ EG x y
· (τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
identity (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) #⊗ EG x y
· τ y y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
τ y y #⊗ EG x y · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
?t2

    exact q.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y)) = τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y)) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) · τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) · τ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y = identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x y y) = identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) = identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  apply mon_linvunitor_lunitor.
Qed.
